01405| function applyTheme(themeName) {
01406|     const theme = themes[themeName];
01407|     if (!theme) return;
01408|     
01409|     const root = document.documentElement;
01410|     
01411|     Object.entries(theme).forEach(([key, value]) => {
01412|         root.style.setProperty(`--${key}`, value);
01413|     });
01414|     
01415|     localStorage.setItem('ecotrack-theme', themeName);
